item.title: They found a 117 year old wooden parquet floor under the carpet in a Glasgow library.
item.description:
Maryhill library in Glasgow UK.
After restoration. See also the rather nifty curved radiators.
Shiny!
#library #bookporn #glasgow #architecture
item.dc:creator: ThatWillBuffOut

item.title: They’re basically ensuring she will run away rebel and lie
item.description: “Checkoutmypearlywhites I’m also bisexual and afraid to tell them” this kids gonna have it rough edit: don’t Message me scolding me for going against God and especially saying she’s damned for being bi you psycho maniacs. I operate on my own moral compass and when I meet my maker will duke it out then. Edit: shout out to cute rocker chicks. It is tradition when I make a decent post. Cheers and happy Sunday everyone.
item.dc:creator: checkoutmypearlywhitesraaaaaaaarrrr

item.title: Got a jamon on clearance for $50. We ate it for a month and now it's finally gone
item.description:
Banana. Jamon serrano for scale
Took the jamon to my sister's house for Christmas
Jamon and ramen
Jamon carbonara
Jamon and fruit and cheese and shit
Jamon benedict
Jamon and Le big Mac. Fries with jamon and hollandaise
Peep the fancy radish carving
Jamon and fried dumps
Green eggs and jamon
Jamon and strawberry shortcakes
Roast chicken and taters with green beans and jamon
Jamon cheese toastie and tomato soup
Wedge salad with crispy jamon, tomato soup with crispy jamon, cheese toastie with no jamon
Carving starting to get tricky
Potato and corn chowder
Rice cake and dumpling soup with jamon
Minced jamon for jamon gravy
Biscuits and jamon gravy
Flipped to the babilla side of the jamon. Getting lazy with carving at this point to just power through the jamon
Jamon and pineapple pizza
Nearing the end of the jamon
Split pea and jamon soup
Jamon breakfast plate
French toast, jamon, egg, and cheese
Jamon and potatoes with parmesan
Deviled eggs with crispy jamon served next to a deviled egg platter
Crispy jamon nibs
Mac and cheese and crispy jamon with collard greens and jamon
Jamon sushi things
Jamon and barley soup
Jamon bloody mary
Jamon quiche
JLT (jamon, lettuce, and tomato)
Jamon and Thai takeout
Jamon pot pie
Drunken jamon and eggs
Jamon and curry
Jamon sharkcoochie
Jamon donut
Jamon breakfast tacos
Salad with crispy jamon
Jamon fried rice
Jamon calzone. Non-jamon pizza
Chili garlic noods with jamon
Baked brie with jamon jam
Made beef and jamon bone soup. @dogmeatsfood on the social things. Thanks for following our jamon journey
item.dc:creator: Turtleramen

item.description: This is the most important thing I've read today. Mad props to ghostclown17 at r/Superstonk
item.dc:creator: RGVhome

item.title: Lyft Driver Extortion
item.description:
I lost my phone in a Lyft driver's car. He starts off saying he is in Sacramento and can't give me my phone.
What he doesn't know is that I can see where he has my phone. I share my location with my fiancé. I can see him giving lifts all over SF
My phone had my debit card attached to it. I couldn't pay his extortion.
It costs nothing to do the right thing.
I get angry and refuse to be intimidated by extortion
Don't ever be a victim of extortion! Sure he kept my material possessions but, I filed a police report. Now I am after his job. If you are from SF and have had something similar happen from the driver named above contact me and I will give you a case number you can call to report this a-hole.
item.dc:creator: Isolde88

item.title: "Put your own mask on first" (Please take care of you)
item.description: Art: https://www.blobbynfriends.com/ https://blobbynfriends.tumblr.com/ https://href.li/?https://www.instagram.com/blobbynfriends/ https://twitter.com/blobbynfriends The title of the post is taken from all airlines in the world. Ever notice how few things we agree on as one human race? This is one of few. Your chance of taking care of someone else is reduced or eliminated unless you take care of you first. You can argue, make scenarios, deny the case studies ... but you're not going to change the facts of human psychology. It doesn't mean being selfish and ignoring others. Just a question of an order of sequence. Steps. ---------------------------------------- Today's Internet message: Don't allow anyone to abuse you one more moment in your life. No one should hit you. Ever. Also, In a healthy relationship your significant other will not demand you can't have friends of a certain gender, race or religious background. A healthy person can get along alone and just wait until another relationship can blossom. Often it's best to get help if you're in an abusive relationship of any kind. I encourage you to seek a professional immediately. Self diagnosis is generally not a good thing. I tried it for 10+ years. Didn't work. This website can help you find someone near you to talk diagnoses: https://www.psychologytoday.com/ [ I have zero association with psychologytoday or any other company or advertising scheme. I'm a semi-retired engineering manager. Just an Imgurian like you. ] Think of it like going to Urgent Care or Emergency Room if you have a serious cut or cough. A professional will tell you next steps - do not self diagnose. If you have a more serious mental health issue, call 911 (US) or message the people at places in this post: https://imgur.com/gallery/cAppClq
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Day 240: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Viltburgare/Game burger Double Beef Smashed Patties, Väddö Cheddar Cheese, Smoked Wild Boar Loin, Frillice Lettuce, Spring Onion And Lingonberry Mayo From Brödernas In Stockholm, Sweden. Thank You @nothingfucksyouharderthantime For This Burger Submission! 12/10 Previous Day 239: https://imgur.com/gallery/XFiubdt MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: Really places like Imgur, Reddit and other social media sites need to start disallowing posts that include harmful breeding practices like the Munchkin under the premise of it being animal cruelty.
item.description: Because honestly the fact that we keep breeding Munchkins on purpose is cruel and horrible and it certainly isn't the only breed out there that is debatably cruel to continue breeding https://www.ufaw.org.uk/cats/munchkin
item.dc:creator: Blundermore

item.title: I -felt- you might like this
item.description:
I made fabric by felting old silk scraps together then made a dress with it.
Fabric before cutting
Felting is when you stab natural fibers to make them stick together.
Nowhere to go so I wore it to my thesis proposal presentstion.
Can't wait to hire professionals again- until then here is my sad attempt at showing the drape and atructure. Should have shown the pockets! My instagram for everyone asking to see more. @padinabondar
item.dc:creator: spadinaaa

item.title: Small dump for those in unhealthy relationships
item.description: Newly separated and learning to be alone again. Struggling with the decision, but my gut tells me it is right. If you are in an unhealthy relationship, I hope you can find the strength within you to take care of yourself and begin the healing process.
item.dc:creator: abbatintin

item.title: Francis Bebey demonstrating how to play the Pigmy Flute (1995)
item.description: Francis Bebey was a noted writer and musician from Cameroon who passed away in May 2001. Peter Gabriel spoke for all who encountered him at the Real World Recording Week in 1995 when he said "We were hypnotized...he embodied wisdom in lots of ways and it was a real delight". Source: Real World Records https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c6T6suvnhco
item.dc:creator: Hauntologist2

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 589
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/FtWkLif Wholesome Post 588 https://imgur.com/gallery/ajvoklC Wholesome Post 587 https://imgur.com/gallery/p7pu0ke Wholesome Post 586 https://imgur.com/gallery/XigKo5W Wholesome Post 585 https://imgur.com/gallery/FF8mNWf Wholesome Post 584 https://imgur.com/gallery/9MIkeB4 Wholesome Post 583 https://imgur.com/gallery/xyMeaV0 Wholesome Post 582
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-sadie-and-the-beans-get-treatment
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/Y4U422F
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay# 9735) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/Y4U422F
item.dc:creator: ryanjoseph666
